headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Monday?
summary: Looking for the S&P500 stocks that are experiencing notable gaps on Monday? Find out which stocks are gapping up and gapping down in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: CBS News Senior White House Reporter Jennifer Jacobs Posts On X "Scoop: Trump scheduled to meet with top executives from the largest U.S. defense contractors on Wednesday, sources tell me. Admin has been ratcheting up pressure on defense contractors re: shareholder payouts. But Northrop Grumman increased their shareholder dividends by about 7% in May."

raw.headline: CBS News Senior White House Reporter Jennifer Jacobs Posts On X "Scoop: Trump scheduled to meet with top executives from the largest U.S. defense contractors on Wednesday, sources tell me.
